case_id: Pedro Alva (not in original NHANES; created synthetically)

pi_items.source: Task setup script creates patient with fname='Pedro' if not found in NHANES data
Task setup script creates patient with lname='Alva' if not found in NHANES data; verified by searching NHANES SQL dump - no 'Pedro Alva' exists in real data
Task description and task.json metadata both specify 2025-02-20 as the date to set in database

Setup script creates appointment with pc_title='Follow Up Visit'; NHANES data contains 'Follow Up' as a postcalendar category (ID 2522), but 'Follow Up Visit' is a custom title stored in pc_title field

pi_items.verified_value: LibreHealthIO/lh-ehr NHANES 2011-2012 real patient data (9,375 de-identified patients from CDC/NIH National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey)
pi_items.source: Found in setup_librehealth.sh: downloads from https://github.com/LibreHealthIO/lh-ehr/raw/master/sql/nhanes/libreehr_nhanes.sql.gz - verified download and inspection of NHANES SQL dump (39MB, 9,380 INSERT statements for patients)
Searched NHANES SQL dump for 'Pedro Alva' - no matches found. Found multiple 'Pedro' patients (Meadows, Hobbs, Barry, Shannon, Jacobson, Bates, Mccarty, Paul, Kerr, Mayer) but no 'Pedro Alva'

Examined NHANES postcalendar_categories table; 'Follow Up Visit' is not in pre-defined categories (which include: No Show, In Office, Out Of Office, Vacation, Office Visit, Holidays, Closed, Lunch, Established Patient, New Patient, Reserved, Health and Behavioral Assessment, Preventive Care Services, Ophthalmological Services)
Verified in setup_librehealth.sh and task.json description

privileged_info_summary: The task 'process_deceased_patient@1' uses real NHANES patient data from the 2011-2012 National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (9,375 de-identified patients from CDC/NIH). However, the specific patient 'Pedro Alva' does not exist in the real NHANES data; it will be created synthetically by the setup script if not found. The patient will be marked deceased with date 2025-02-20 (a future date, not from historical NHANES data). The appointment 'Follow Up Visit' is created synthetically with a title field (not a pre-defined calendar category). Login credentials are admin/password. The data is primarily real (NHANES) but the specific test case (Pedro Alva, deceased date, appointment) is entirely synthetic.
